code: import React from'react';import{timetable}from'../data/data';import'./PageStyles.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Timetable(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"page-wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-hero",style:{background:'linear-gradient(135deg, #b45309, #7c3aed)'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"pre-label-white",children:"Schedule"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Weekly Timetable"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Plan your dance week with ease"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"timetable-grid",children:timetable.map(day=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"day-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"day-header",children:["\uD83D\uDCC5 ",day.day]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"slots",children:day.slots.map((slot,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"slot",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"slot-time",children:slot.time}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"slot-course",children:slot.course}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"slot-meta",children:["\uD83D\uDC64 ",slot.instructor," \xB7 \uD83C\uDFE0 ",slot.room]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"badge badge-purple",style:{marginTop:6,fontSize:'0.72rem'},children:slot.batch})]},i))})]},day.day))})})})]});}
